topic: Direct bank integration for WPS submission — what disappears from the HR team's monthly checklist
format: Lead with a quote or question from a customer, then explain the feature built in response
post:
"Every month, someone on our HR team spends half a day just chasing the bank confirmation that WPS went through."

That came from a real customer. And honestly, I've heard versions of it from dozens of businesses across Oman and the GCC.

WPS payroll is technically "automated" for most of them. But the process around it isn't.

Someone still exports the file. Uploads it to the bank portal. Waits. Takes a screenshot. Sends it to finance. Files it somewhere nobody will find in six months when the auditors come calling.

That's not automation. That's the same manual work, just dressed differently.

SmartPro Hub connects directly to the bank. Once payroll is approved inside the platform, the submission goes through — no file exports, no portal switching, no follow-up email asking "did it go through yet?"

What disappears: the back-and-forth, the waiting, the confirmation chase.

What stays: a clean audit trail that HR, finance, and management can all actually see — in one place.

For companies running WPS payroll at scale in Oman, that's real hours back every month. Multiply that by 12.

What's the most time-consuming step in your current payroll process?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
